source_name: DISR Resources and Energy Major Projects - critical minerals pipeline

fields.scope: DISR Resources and Energy Major Projects (RE-Major Projects) catalogue tracks all projects above a capex threshold across resource commodities including critical minerals.
fields.primary_source_document: DISR, Resources and Energy Major Projects (annual database, December edition typical).
fields.keying_plan: Key counts and capex aggregates by lifecycle stage for critical minerals projects only. Distinguish onshore midstream processing capex from upstream extraction.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed project pipeline counts and capex from the DISR RE-Major Projects database. The pipeline is the main forward-looking indicator for whether Australia is moving up the value chain into refining and battery components.
citation: DISR, Resources and Energy Major Projects.
